case_title: ANGELO KRATSAS VS. CAPITAL ONE, NATIONAL ASSOCATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-05-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,500.00 FILED BY KRATSAS, ANGELO AS TO DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE, NATIONAL ASSOCATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE, NATIONAL ASSOCATION
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
EXHIBIT (DEFENDANT) FOR ZOOM HEARING - RECEIVED {HEARING: NOV-05-2021 AT 8:30AM}; RECEIVED VIA DROP-BOX FILED BY DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE, NATIONAL ASSOCATION
(SC-109) AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR KAYLA CAMPBELL TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF CAPITAL ONE BANK FILED BY DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE, NATIONAL ASSOCATION AS TO PLAINTIFF KRATSAS, ANGELO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE MADE BY PLAINTIFF. KAYLA CAMPBELL APPEARING ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE, NATIONAL ASSOCATION. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF.
EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.
